summary: Phase 1 (Cross-Engine Linking + AI Everywhere) end-to-end tested. Backend: 8/8 pytest cases pass (workspace/related client_id, deal_id, content_id; crm/clients/{id}; ai/assist for deal_close, improve_bio, profile_bio; morning-brief POST). Frontend: CRMClientDetail renders with all 4 tabs and counts, open-client-<id> navigates correctly, related-deal-<id> navigates to /crm/deals/<id>. CRMDealDetail: deal-ai-predict card + predict-close-btn produce a 581-char Arabic prediction in ~5s; stage buttons + activity-form intact (no regression). ContentDetail: linked-client-card renders and navigates to CRMClientDetail. EditProfile: improve-bio-btn label='اكتب لي bio' when empty, populated a 451-char Arabic bio in ~8s. Workspace morning-brief-card and /u/:username profile route both work — no ReferenceError.
critical_code_review_comments: CRMDealDetail.jsx: predictClose reads deal.updated_at which may be undefined for freshly created deals — will produce NaN days_since_update. Minor, but worth guarding with `deal.updated_at ? ... : 0`.
ContentDetail.jsx: sequential await for /crm/clients/{id} and /workspace/related after initial load could be Promise.all-ed for a slightly snappier UI (nice-to-have, not blocking).

CRMClientDetail.jsx: 'delete-client-btn' testid exists in header but CRMClients.jsx also uses 'delete-client-<id>' — naming inconsistency is fine, but note both testids co-exist for the same functional area.

No pagination on related lists (deals/content/tasks/activities) — fine for now, but if a client accumulates >100 activities the /workspace/related response can grow. Consider server-side limit on the endpoint.
seed_data_creation: Linked existing content item (1d9a5ebe...) to existing client (217905a8...) via PUT /api/content/items/{id} with body {client_id} — needed to verify linked-client-card. Existing deal dec13d85... on Alba Cafe client was used as-is.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The super_admin dataset now has 1 client (Alba Cafe, 217905a8-1da8-4a43-bc59-566f2417ba9b), 1 deal on that client (dec13d85..., stage=won), and 1 content item (1d9a5ebe...) linked to that same client. There are no linked tasks yet — 'deal-task-*' and 'content-task-*' selectors were confirmed absent (as expected). If future iterations add a task with client_id or deal_id, those testids should appear. AI endpoint (Claude Sonnet 4.5 via /api/ai/assist) is healthy and quota is available.
